summary: Iteration 102 - Family data cross-fiche pre-filling feature tested and PASSED. Backend API and Frontend SSRTE modal both working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/ici-data/farmers/{farmer_id}/family-data endpoint correctly merges ICI + SSRTE data
SSRTEVisitModal.jsx correctly loads family data via useEffect when modal opens
Pre-filled banner (data-testid='prefilled-banner') shows when data.source is truthy
All family fields (taille_menage, nombre_enfants, liste_enfants, conditions_vie, eau_courante, electricite, distance_ecole_km) are correctly pre-filled
ICIProfileModal.jsx has fallback to family-data endpoint when no ICI profile exists
seed_data_creation: None - used existing SSRTE visit data for farmer 69d27ef947797cbad7193b8a
context_for_next_testing_agent: Family data pre-filling feature is working. The family-data endpoint returns merged ICI+SSRTE data. SSRTE modal shows pre-filled banner and loads all family fields when opening for a farmer with existing data.

backend: GET /api/ici-data/farmers/69d27ef947797cbad7193b8a/family-data - returns taille_menage=6, nombre_enfants=3, source=ici+ssrte - PASSED
GET /api/ici-data/farmers/000000000000000000000000/family-data - returns empty data with source=null for unknown farmer - PASSED
Children details (Awa, Moussa, Fatou) correctly returned in liste_enfants - PASSED
frontend: SSRTE Modal opens for farmer Konan Yao Pierre - PASSED
Pre-filled banner visible with text 'Informations familiales pre-remplies depuis les fiches precedentes' - PASSED
Children details pre-filled (Awa 8yo, Moussa 12yo, Fatou 5yo) - PASSED

frontend_ssrte_modal.banner_text: Informations familiales pre-remplies depuis les fiches precedentes. Vous pouvez les modifier si necessaire.
